meta.title: Hindu Vrat & Fasting Calendar 2026
meta.description: Ekadashi, Chaturthi, Pradosh, Amavasya and major Hindu fasting days for Pune, India (IST)

vrats.name: Papmochani Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Destroys all sins; ideal for deep fasting and Vishnu puja

vrats.name: Kamada Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Fulfills desires; removes sins of previous births

vrats.name: Mohini Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Liberation from cycle of birth and death

vrats.name: Apara Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Removes greatest sins; grants moksha

vrats.name: Nirjala Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Most powerful Ekadashi; fast without water for one day

vrats.name: Yogini Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Removes sins and grants spiritual powers

vrats.name: Ashadha Amavasya
vrats.significance: Ideal for ancestor worship and tarpan rituals

vrats.name: Kamika Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Removes sins; blesses with spiritual and material prosperity

vrats.name: Shravana Purnima (Raksha Bandhan)
vrats.significance: Raksha Bandhan; sacred thread binding ceremony

vrats.name: Janmashtami (Krishna Jayanti)
vrats.significance: Birth of Lord Krishna; fast and night vigil till midnight

vrats.name: Indira Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Removes ancestral curses; grants salvation to ancestors

vrats.name: Ganesh Chaturthi
vrats.significance: Birth of Lord Ganesha; removes obstacles

vrats.name: Parsva Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Marks Vishnu's turning in sleep; cleanses sins

vrats.name: Navratri Day 1 (Shardiya Navratri)
vrats.fasting_type: 9 days sattvic diet or full fast
vrats.significance: Nine nights of Goddess worship; first day of major Navratri

vrats.name: Maha Navami (Navratri Day 9)
vrats.significance: Ninth day of Navratri; worship of Siddhidatri form

vrats.name: Dussehra (Vijayadashami)
vrats.significance: Victory of Rama over Ravana; end of Navratri

vrats.name: Papankusha Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Destroys all sins like a hook destroys enemies

vrats.name: Rama Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Grants liberation and removes all sins

vrats.name: Diwali (Lakshmi Puja)
vrats.significance: Festival of lights; Lakshmi puja for prosperity

vrats.name: Kartik Purnima
vrats.significance: Most auspicious full moon; ideal for holy bath and charity

vrats.name: Utpanna Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Birth of Ekadashi Devi; grants salvation and liberation

vrats.name: Mokshada Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Grants moksha (liberation); one of the most powerful Ekadashi

vrats.name: Saphala Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Makes life fruitful; grants material and spiritual success
